notes: Repo-local P4 Template memory. stability is the number of distinct source runs; status becomes stable at 5 projects/runs.

templates.description: top-down-2d Canvas scaffold with dash, collectible-score, fail-timer, dash-input

contract.observationDigest: window.__af { status, score, winTarget, playerMoved, playerPos, frame }
contract.commandSurface: window.__afStep(input, dt) advances the same update/render path
contract.assetPattern: single generated sprite loaded via Image and drawn with ctx.drawImage
